title: Roz Mitiye Kaise
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Roz Mitiye Kaise" where he says in relationships there shouldn't be any ego & people should try to control their anger for the betterment of their. S01 E32.

title: Subodh Beech Pari
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Subodh Beech Pari" where he elaborates on family bonds. He says when an understanding person tries to resolve a fight, he always aims at creating a. S01 E44.

title: Ek Saadhey Sab
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Rahim's doha "Ek Saadhey Sab" where he says, we must focus on one task at a time, if one tries to work on multiple tasks at the same time, none of the tasks will be. S01 E04.

title: Kariye Sukh
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Kariye Sukh" where he says, people can't be truly happy if they make others sad. One must take care to ensure that his happiness does not cause sadness to. S01 E11.

title: Uttam Jan So
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Uttam Jan So" where he says, just as the saline sea leaves its saltiness & becomes sweet on meeting the clouds, one should always keep the company of good. S01 E25.

title: Maarag Chalte Jau
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Maarag Chalte Jau" where he says, a person walking on a path is on a journey & if he falls do not criticize him, as he is at least trying to reach. S01 E23.

title: Bigdi Baat Banai
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Rahim's doha "Bigdi Baat Banai" where he says, if things go wrong, there is no use of sitting hanging on it, but a new industry should be started anew. S01 E10.

title: Ari Chotau
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Ari Chotau" where he says, never consider your enemies weak, less or ordinary because even a small spark can destroy a big stack of hay. S01 E73.

title: Je Na Hoye
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Je Na Hoye" where he says, people who are strong & internally powerful are like flowing water, they can't be still in life & always want to keep flowing. S01 E13.

title: Ati Parichaen
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Ati Parichaen" where he talks about how familiarity breeds contempt. Hence, similarity is comforting but you need diversification to grow and appreciate. S01 E48.

title: Chale Jo Panth
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Chale Jo Panth" where he speaks about how not to be over confident about ourselves. He says there should be a give & take policy only then your talent can. S01 E31.

title: Bade Bade Saun
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Bade Bade Saun" where he says, a storm destroys biggest of trees, but the small plants remain safe, similarly we should be humble to be protected from the. S01 E38.

title: Pher Na Hwey
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Pher Na Hwey" where he speaks about trust, faith, relationship, love, lies & how all these aspects impact our relationships. S01 E34.
